newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'If only I had taken the earlier train, I wouldn't be stuck here now.' What is true about the speaker?
options: He missed the earlier train and is now stuck.
He is about to catch the earlier train.
newQuiz.explanation: If only + 過去完成式 (had taken) 表與過去事實相反的遺憾,代表他『沒有』搭上較早的車;主句 wouldn't be stuck 表現在被困。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ If only I had taken... 是與過去相反的假設,真正事實正好相反——他沒搭上;別把假設句聽成真的搭到了。

newQuiz.stem: You hear two speakers. W: 'Did you finish the report?' M: 'I would have, if my laptop hadn't crashed.' What happened?
options: He did not finish because the laptop crashed.
His laptop is fine and the report is done.
newQuiz.explanation: I would have (finished), if my laptop hadn't crashed = 第三條件句,真實情況是電腦當機所以『沒』完成。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ would have + if...hadn't 表與事實相反;laptop hadn't crashed 是假設,真實情形是『電腦真的當機了』,報告沒做完。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'Hardly had I sat down when the phone rang.' Which happened first?
options: They happened at exactly the same second, unrelated.
newQuiz.explanation: Hardly had I sat down when... = 我才剛坐下,電話就響了;past perfect (had sat) 的動作先發生,故『坐下』在前。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Hardly had + 過去完成式...when... 表前一動作剛完成另一件就發生;had sat down 是較早的動作,別因為 when 引導電話而誤判電話在先。

newQuiz.stem: On a train announcement: 'Passengers for Platform 3 should change at the next stop, except those traveling to Greenfield.' Who stays on the train at the next stop?
options: Only passengers not going to Platform 3.
newQuiz.explanation: should change... except those traveling to Greenfield = 除了往 Greenfield 的乘客都要換車,故往 Greenfield 者留在車上不換。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ except 引導『例外』,被排除者行為相反——去 Greenfield 的人『不用』換車;別把全體都當成要換車。

newQuiz.stem: You hear a weather forecast: 'It'll be sunny in the morning, but showers are likely to move in by late afternoon.' What should you prepare for the afternoon?
newQuiz.explanation: showers are likely to move in by late afternoon = 傍晚前可能下陣雨,故下午要為下雨做準備。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ but 後轉折才是重點;聽到開頭 sunny 就選晴天會錯,showers(陣雨)move in by late afternoon 才是下午的關鍵。

newQuiz.stem: Phone message: 'This is Dr. Lee's office. Your appointment on Monday has been moved up to this Friday at 10.' When is the appointment now?
newQuiz.explanation: moved up = 提前;原本週一的約診提前到『本週五十點』。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ moved up 是『提前』而非延後或維持原狀;聽到 Monday 是舊時間,新時間是 Friday,別選錯。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'I can't thank you enough for what you've done.' What does the speaker mean?
options: He is unable to thank the person.
He has nothing to thank for.
newQuiz.explanation: can't thank you enough = 再怎麼感謝都不夠,表示非常感激,是強調感謝的慣用語。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ can't...enough 是『再…也不夠』的強調讚美句型,意思正好是極度感謝;別被字面 can't 誤解為無法感謝。

newQuiz.stem: At a restaurant. W: 'Would you care for some dessert?' M: 'I'd better not; I'm watching my weight.' What does the man do?
newQuiz.explanation: I'd better not + I'm watching my weight(我在控制體重)= 婉拒甜點。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ I'd better not 是委婉拒絕;watching my weight 是控制體重的理由,別把 care for(想要)當成他要點甜點。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'No sooner had the game started than it began to pour.' What is the correct sequence?
options: It rained, then the game started.
The game started, then it rained almost immediately.
The game was cancelled before starting.
It rained the whole day before the game.
newQuiz.explanation: No sooner had the game started than it began to pour = 比賽一開始就立刻下起大雨;had started 動作在前。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ No sooner...than... 表『一…就…』,had started 為先發生的動作;than 後的下雨緊接在後,別倒過來判斷。

newQuiz.stem: A store clerk says: 'The jacket is on sale, but only if you buy two or more items.' When do you get the sale price?
options: Only when buying two or more items.
Only on items other than the jacket.
newQuiz.explanation: only if you buy two or more items = 條件是買兩件以上才享特價。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ only if 設定『唯一條件』;沒買滿兩件就沒折扣,別聽到 on sale 就以為單買也享優惠。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'I wish I could come to your party, but I'll be out of town.' Will the speaker attend?
options: No, the speaker will be away.
newQuiz.explanation: I wish I could come(我希望能來,但其實不能)+ but I'll be out of town(我會出城)= 無法參加。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ I wish I could come 表『無法前往的遺憾』,並非答應;but I'll be out of town 已點明缺席原因。

newQuiz.stem: Announcement: 'Flight BA208 to Paris is now boarding at Gate 12; the previously announced Gate 9 is no longer in use.' Which gate should passengers go to?
newQuiz.explanation: boarding at Gate 12 + Gate 9 is no longer in use = 改在 12 號登機門,9 號已停用。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 機場廣播常更改登機門;no longer in use 表 9 號作廢,正確是新公布的 Gate 12,別記住第一個聽到的號碼。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'It's high time we left for the airport.' What does the speaker imply?
options: There is plenty of time left.
We should have left already; we're late.
We just arrived at the airport.
newQuiz.explanation: It's high time + 過去式 (we left) = 早該…了,暗示出發時間已過、該趕快走。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ It's high time we left 用過去式表『早就該做』的催促語氣,意指已經太晚,不是還有充裕時間。

newQuiz.stem: W: 'How was the movie?' M: 'It could have been better.' What is the man's opinion?
options: The movie was the best ever.
newQuiz.explanation: It could have been better = 本來可以更好,委婉表達『不夠好、有點失望』。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ could have been better 是委婉的負評,意思是『不太好』;別把 better 當成稱讚而誤選優秀。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'Take this medicine twice a day, but not on an empty stomach.' When should you avoid taking it?
newQuiz.explanation: not on an empty stomach = 不要空腹時服用,故肚子空空(沒吃東西)時應避免。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ on an empty stomach = 空腹;not on an empty stomach 表『別空腹吃』,要在飯後或進食後服用,別理解反了。

newQuiz.stem: Two friends. M: 'Shall we walk or take a taxi?' W: 'It's pouring outside, so let's not risk getting soaked.' What will they do?
options: Wait until it stops, then walk.
newQuiz.explanation: It's pouring(下大雨)+ let's not risk getting soaked(別冒險淋濕)= 選擇搭計程車而非步行。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 需整合『下大雨』與『不想淋濕』兩個線索推論;否定句 let's not...walk 暗示排除走路,故搭計程車。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'Not only did she pass the exam, but she also got the highest score.' What is true?
options: She passed and scored the highest.
She only passed but scored low.
newQuiz.explanation: Not only...but also... = 不僅…而且…;她不僅通過,還拿了最高分,兩件都是肯定的。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ Not only...but also 是『遞進肯定』而非否定;聽到 Not only 開頭別誤判為否定,兩個訊息都成立。

newQuiz.stem: A neighbor says: 'You're welcome to use the garden anytime, as long as you lock the gate when you leave.' What is the condition?
options: You can never use the garden.
You may use it if you lock the gate on leaving.
You must ask permission each time.
You can only use it when the owner is home.
newQuiz.explanation: as long as you lock the gate = 只要離開時鎖門,就可隨時使用花園。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ as long as 引導『條件』,鎖門是使用花園的唯一前提;別把 anytime 當成毫無條件。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'The teacher said we needn't have brought our textbooks today.' What does this mean about the textbooks?
options: They brought textbooks, but it turned out unnecessary.
They forgot the textbooks at home.
newQuiz.explanation: needn't have brought = 其實不必帶卻帶了,表示『帶了但白帶了』。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ needn't have + 過去分詞 表『做了卻沒必要』;事實是他們有帶,只是不必要,別誤聽成沒帶或被要求帶。

newQuiz.stem: Library announcement: 'The library closes at 9, but the study rooms must be vacated by 8:30.' By when must you leave the study rooms?
newQuiz.explanation: study rooms must be vacated by 8:30 = 自習室須在八點半前清空,與整館九點關門不同。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ 同段含兩個時間,closes at 9 是全館,study rooms 的截止是 8:30;別把整館關門時間套到自習室。

newQuiz.stem: You hear: 'I'd sooner stay home than go out in this heat.' What does the speaker prefer?
newQuiz.explanation: would sooner A than B = 寧願 A 也不要 B;偏好 stay home(待在家)勝過出門。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ would sooner...than... 與 would rather...than 同義,偏好的是 than 前的 stay home;句尾的 go out 是被比下去的選項,別反選。
